author: barnabasbusa
content:
```yaml
zkboost_params:
  image: ghcr.io/eth-act/zkboost/zkboost:0.5.0
  env:
    RUST_LOG: info,zkboost=debug
  instances:
    - name: zkboost-1
      el_participant_index: 0
  zkvms:
    - kind: ere
      proof_type: reth-zisk
      image: ghcr.io/eth-act/ere/ere-server-zisk:0.6.1-cuda
      program_url: https://github.com/eth-act/ere-guests/releases/download/v0.7.0/stateless-validator-reth-zisk
      port: 3000
      gpu:
        device_ids: ["0"]
        shm_size: 32768
        ulimits:
          memlock: -1
      env:
        RUST_LOG: info
        ERE_ZISK_SETUP_ON_INIT: "1"
        ERE_ZISK_START_SERVER_TIMEOUT_SEC: "600"

```

author: barnabasbusa
content: this kinda configuration should be the default imo

author: barnabasbusa
content: not sure what we are defaulting now

author: barnabasbusa
content: but I shouldn't need to do any of this

author: barnabasbusa
content:
minimum config should be:

```yaml
participants:
  - cl_type: lighthouse
    cl_image: ethpandaops/lighthouse:eth-act-optional-proofs
    el_type: reth
    el_image: ghcr.io/paradigmxyz/reth
    supernode: true
    cl_extra_params:
      - --target-peers=3
      - --proof-engine-endpoint=http://zkboost-1:3000
      - --proof-types=6
    vc_extra_params:
      - --proof-engine-endpoint=http://zkboost-1:3000
      - --proof-types=6
    count: 2
  - cl_type: lighthouse
    cl_image: ethpandaops/lighthouse:unstable
    el_type: reth
    el_image: ghcr.io/paradigmxyz/reth
    supernode: true
    count: 2

network_params:
  seconds_per_slot: 30

additional_services:
  - zkboost
```
